overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in a long coat and hat walking along a rainy wooden harbor dock in Saint Denis. The character explores the pier, passing cargo crates, a Harbor Master building, and moored ships under an overcast gray sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide wooden cargo dock with scattered industrial equipment

events.description: approaching the Harbor Master building entrance as the dock narrows

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wide wooden dock toward the Harbor Master building, passing cargo crates and wooden carts

entered.detail: wet wooden planks forming the dock surface
wooden crates and barrels stacked on the dock
metal cargo crane structure with wooden beams
green wooden two-story building with clock and SAINT DENIS signage
large white and black steamship moored alongside the dock

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide wooden dock scattered with cargo crates and industrial equipment. The Harbor Master building looms ahead under gray overcast skies, while a large steamship is moored to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow dock passage between Harbor Master building and moored steamship

events.description: entering narrow passage between the Harbor Master building and the steamship hull

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow wooden dock squeezed between the Harbor Master building and the large steamship

entered.detail: white wooden support pillars under the Harbor Master building
simple wooden benches along the building wall

segments.scene_description: The dock narrows into a confined passage between the green Harbor Master building on the left and the massive hull of the steamship on the right. The character walks under wooden support beams as the space becomes increasingly tight.

scene_state.functional_zone: end of dock with moored sailboats and open water view

events.description: character stops at the end of the dock to look at the moored sailboats in the water
character turns around and begins walking back toward the Harbor Master building

agents.ego_description: reaching the end of the dock, pausing to observe the sailboats moored in the water, then turning to walk back

entered.detail: wooden sailboats with tall masts moored in the harbor water
wooden sign reading WARNING KEEP OFF attached to support beams

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the end of the dock where it opens to the water, revealing wooden sailboats moored in the harbor. After pausing to look at the water, the character turns around and begins the return walk, passing a warning sign on the support beams.

scene_state.functional_zone: return path along dock with view of red paddlewheel steamboat

events.description: passing the Harbor Master building reveals the red paddlewheel steamboat ahead

agents.ego_description: walking back along the dock past the Harbor Master building, heading toward the large red paddlewheel steamboat visible in the harbor

notable_agents.action: man standing on the porch of the Harbor Master building smoking a pipe

entered.detail: large red and white paddlewheel steamboat with twin smokestacks
tall industrial chimneys emitting smoke in the background

segments.scene_description: Walking back along the dock, the character passes the Harbor Master building where a man stands smoking on the porch. The view opens to reveal a large red paddlewheel steamboat moored in the harbor ahead, with industrial smokestacks visible in the misty background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rainy harbor dock that transitions from an open industrial pier into a confined passage before expanding again to reveal the wider port. It begins with the character walking past cargo crates and industrial equipment toward the Harbor Master building, with a large steamship moored to the right under gray overcast skies. As the character advances, the environment narrows into a tight corridor squeezed between the green walls of the building and the massive hull of the ship. The scene then opens up at the end of the dock to reveal wooden sailboats on the water, before the character turns around to begin the return journey past a warning sign on the support beams. Finally, the view expands as the character passes a man smoking on the porch, revealing a large red paddlewheel steamboat and distant industrial smokestacks fading into the mist.
